Uses of Class
org.apache.bookkeeper.client.EnsemblePlacementPolicy.PlacementResult

Packages that use EnsemblePlacementPolicy.PlacementResult
Package
Description
org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie
Provides a Bookie server that stores entries for clients.
org.apache.bookkeeper.client
BookKeeper Client.
